Env override: `MIROIR_MASTER_KEY`.\n    pub master_key: String,\n    /// Key Miroir uses on Meilisearch nodes. Production: 2.\n    pub replication_factor: u32,\n    /// Number of independent query pools. health: HealthConfig,\n    pub scatter: ScatterConfig,\n    pub rebalancer: RebalancerConfig,\n    pub server: ServerConfig,\n    pub connection_pool_per_node: ConnectionPoolConfig,\n    pub    pub peer_discovery: PeerDiscoveryConfig,\n    pub leader_election: LeaderElectionConfig,\n    pub hpa: HpaConfig,\n}\n\n/// Convenience alias.\npub type Config = MiroirConfig;\n\nimpl Default for          request_timeout_ms: default_request_timeout_ms(),\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// HTTP/2 connection pool per-node settings (§14.8).\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Serialize, /// TTL for completed tasks in seconds. Tasks older than this are pruned.\n    pub ttl_seconds: u64,\n    /// How often the pruner runs, in seconds.\n    pub prune_interval_s: u64,\n    /// Maximum rows deleted per pruner iteration.\n    pub prune_batch_size: u32,\n}\n\nimpl Default for TaskRegistryConfig {\n    fn default() -> Self {\n        Self {\n            cache_size: 10000,\n            redis_pool_max: 50,\n            ttl_seconds: 7 * 24 * 3600, // 7 days\n            prune_interval_s: 300,       // 5 min\n            prune_batch_size: 10000,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n/// Peer discovery via Kubernetes headless Deserialize, Default)]\n#[serde(default)]\npub struct HpaConfig {\n    #[serde(default)]\n    pub enabled: bool,\n}\n\n/// Policy for handling unavailable shards during scatter.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]\n#[serde(rename_all = \"snake_case\")]\npub enum UnavailableShardPolicy {\n    /// Return partial results from available nodes.\n    Partial,\n    /// Fail the request if any shard is unavailable.\n    Error,\n    /// Fall back to another replica group for unavailable shards.\n    Fallback,\n}\n\nimpl Default for UnavailableShardPolicy {\n    fn default() -> Self {\n        Self::Partial\n    }\n}\n\nimpl std::fmt::Display for UnavailableShardPolicy {\n    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {\n        match self {\n            Self::Partial => write!(f, \"partial\"),\n            Self::Error => write!(f, \"error\"),\n            Self::Fallback => write!(f, \"fallback\"),\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n\n    /// Returns a minimal valid dev config (single-node, sqlite, RF=1).\n    fn dev_config() -> MiroirConfig {\n        MiroirConfig {\n            replication_factor: 1,\n            task_store: TaskStoreConfig {\n                backend: \"sqlite\".into(),\n                ..Default::default()\n            },\n            cdc: advanced::CdcConfig {\n                buffer: advanced::CdcBufferConfig {\n                    overflow: \"drop\".into(),\n                    ..Default::default()\n                },\n                ..Default::default()\n            },\n            search_ui: advanced::SearchUiConfig {\n                rate_limit: advanced::SearchUiRateLimitConfig {\n                    backend: \"local\".into(),\n                    ..Default::default()\n                },\n                ..Default::default()\n            },\n            ..Default::default()\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn default_config_is_valid() {\n        let cfg = MiroirConfig::default();\n        // Default has replication_factor=2 with sqlite, which should fail\n        // validation — but the struct itself should construct fine.\n        assert_eq!(cfg.shards, 64);\n        assert_eq!(cfg.replication_factor, 2);\n        assert_eq!(cfg.replica_groups, 1);\n        assert_eq!(cfg.task_store.backend, \"sqlite\");\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn minimal_yaml_deserializes() {\n        let yaml = r#\"\nshards: 32\nreplication_factor: 1\nnodes: []\n\"#;\n        let }\n78\t        }\n79\t\n80\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n81\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n82\t        } else {\n83\t            0.0\n84\t        };\n85\t\n86\t        let n = total_docs as f64;\n87\t        let terms = term_df\n88\t            .into_iter()\n89\t            .map(|(term, df)| {\n90\t                let idf = if df == 0 {\n91\t                    0.0\n92\t                } else {\n93\t                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n94\t                };\n95\t                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n96\t            })\n97\t            .collect();\n98\t\n99\t        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n100\t    }\n101\t}\n102\t\n103\t// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n345\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n346\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n347\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n348\t\n349\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n350\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n351\t\n352\t        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n353\t        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n354\t        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n355\t\n356\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n357\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n358\t\n359\t        // Ensure query is set\n360\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n361\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n362\t        }\n363\t\n364\t        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n365\t        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n366\t            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n367\t        }\n368\t\n369\t        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n370\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n371\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        body\n375\t    }\n376\t}\n377\t\n378\t#[derive(Debug)]\n379\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n380\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n381\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n382\t    pub partial: bool,\n383\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n384\t}\n385\t\n386\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n387\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter(\n388\t    topology: &Topology,\n389\t    query_seq: u64,\n390\t    rf: usize,\n391\t    shard_count: u32,\n392\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n393\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n394\t    let chosen_group = crate::router::query_group_active(query_seq, topology);\n395\t\n396\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n397\t        Some(g) => g,\n398\t        None => {\n399\t            return ScatterPlan {\n400\t                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n401\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n402\t            };\n403\t        }\n404\t    };\n405\t\n406\t    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n407\t\n408\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n409\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n410\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n411\t\n412\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n413\t            match selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n414\t                Some(node) => node,\n415\t                None => replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone(),\n416\t            }\n417\t        } else {\n418\t            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n419\t        };\n420\t\n421\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n422\t    }\n423\t\n424\t    ScatterPlan {\n425\t        chosen_group,\n426\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n427\t        shard_to_node,\n428\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n429\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n430\t    }\n431\t}\n432\t\n433\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n434\t///\n435\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n436\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n437\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n438\t    topology: &Topology,\n439\t    query_seq: u64,\n440\t    rf: usize,\n441\t    shard_count: u32,\n442\t    index: &str,\n443\t    floor: u64,\n444\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n445\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n446\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n447\t    let chosen_group = crate::router::query_group_active(query_seq, topology);\n448\t\n449\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n450\t\n451\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n452\t        shard_count,\n453\t        group,\n454\t        rf,\n455\t        query_seq,\n456\t        index,\n457\t        floor,\n458\t        version_checker,\n459\t    )?;\n460\t\n461\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n462\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count   .iter()\n467\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n468\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n469\t                version >= floor\n470\t            })\n471\t            .collect();\n472\t\n473\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n474\t            return None;\n475\t        }\n476\t\n477\t        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n478\t            // Convert Vec<&NodeId> to Vec<NodeId> for selector\n479\t            let eligible_owned: Vec<NodeId> = eligible.iter().map(|&n| n.clone()).collect();\n480\t            match selector.select(&eligible_owned, chosen_group).await {\n481\t                Some(node) => node,\n482\t                None => eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone(),\n483\t            }\n484\t        } else {\n485\t            eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone()\n486\t        };\n487\t\n488\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n489\t    }\n490\t\n491\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n492\t        chosen_group,\n493\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n494\t        shard_to_node,\n495\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n496\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n497\t    })\n498\t}\n499\t\n500\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n501\t///\n502\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n503\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n504\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n505\t    topology: &Topology,\n506\t    query_seq: u64,\n507\t    rf: usize,\n508\t    shard_count: u32,\n509\t    pinned_group: u32,\n510\t    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n511\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n512\t    let group shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n531\t    }\n532\t\n533\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n534\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n535\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n536\t        shard_to_node,\n537\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n538\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n539\t    })\n540\t}\n541\t\n542\t/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n543\t///\n544\t/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n545\t/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n546\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n547\tpub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n548\t    topology: &Topology,\n549\t    query_seq: u64,\n550\t    rf: usize,\n551\t    shard_count: u32,\n552\t    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n553\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n554\t    let chosen_group = crate::router::query_group_active(query_seq, topology);\n555\t\n556\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n557\t        Some(g) => g,\n558\t        None => {\n559\t            return ScatterPlan {\n560\t                chosen_group,\n561\t                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n562\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n563\t                deadline_ms: 0,\n564\t                hedging_eligible: false,\n565\t            };\n566\t        }\n567\t    };\n568\t\n569\t    // If the group has no nodes, return a plan with no targets\n570\t    if group.nodes().is_empty() {\n571\t        return ScatterPlan {\n572\t            chosen_group,\n573\t            target_shards: Vec::new(),\n574\t            shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n575\t            deadline_ms: 5000,\n576\t            hedging_eligible: false,\n577\t        };\n578\t    }\n579\t\n580\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n581\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n582\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n583\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n584\t            continue;\n585\t        }\n586\t\n587\t        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n588\t        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n589\t            Some(node) => node,\n590\t            None => {\n591\t                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n592\t                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n593\t            }\n594\t        };\n595\t\n596\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n597\t    }\n598\t\n599\t    ScatterPlan {\n600\t        chosen_group,\n601\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n602\t        shard_to_node,\n603\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n604\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n605\t    }\n606\t}\n607\t\n608\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n609\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n610\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n611\t    client: &C,\n612\t    req: SearchRequest,\n613\t    topology: &Topology,\n614\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n615\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n616\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n617\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n618\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n619\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n620\t        }\n621\t    }\n622\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n623\t\n624\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n625\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n626\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n627\t\n628\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n629\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n630\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n631\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n632\t            None => {\n633\t                for shard_id in shards {\n634\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n635\t                }\n636\t                continue;\n637\t            }\n638\t        };\n639\t        let client_ref = client;\n640\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n641\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n642\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n643\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n644\t        let span = info_span!(\n645\t            \"scatter_node\",\n646\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n647\t            address = %node.address,\n648\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n649\t        );\n650\t        tasks.push(async move {\n651\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n652\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n653\t        }.instrument(span));\n654\t    }\n655\t\n656\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n657\t\n658\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n659\t        match result {\n660\t            Ok(body) => {\n661\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n662\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n663\t                }\n664\t            }\n665\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n666\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n667\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n668\t            }\n669\t            Err(e) => {\n670\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n671\t            }\n672\t        }\n673\t    }\n674\t\n675\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n676\t\n677\t    match policy {\n678\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n679\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n680\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n681\t            }\n682\t        }\n683\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n684\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n685\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n686\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n687\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n688\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n689\t\n690\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n691\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n692\t\n693\t                    // Try each other replica group\n694\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n695\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n696\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n697\t                        }\n698\t\n699\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n700\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n701\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n702\t                                continue;\n703\t                            }\n704\t\n705\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n706\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n707\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n708\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n709\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n710\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n711\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n712\t                                            break;\n713\t                                        }\n714\t                                        Err(_) => {\n715\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n716\t                                        }\n717\t                                    }\n718\t                                }\n719\t                            }\n720\t\n721\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n722\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n723\t                            }\n724\t                        }\n725\t                    }\n726\t\n727\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n728\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n729\t                    }\n730\t                }\n731\t\n732\t                // Merge fallback results\n733\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n734\t\n735\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n736\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n737\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n738\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n739\t                        shard_pages,\n740\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n741\t                        partial: false,\n742\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n743\t                    });\n744\t                } else {\n745\t                    // Some shards still failed\n746\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n747\t                }\n748\t            }\n749\t        }\n750\t    }\n751\t\n752\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n753\t}\n754\t\n755\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n756\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n757\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n758\t    client: &C,\n759\t    req: SearchRequest,\n760\t    topology: &Topology,\n761\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n762\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n763\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n764\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n765\t\n766\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n767\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n768\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n769\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n770\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n771\t            });\n772\t        }\n773\t    }\n774\t\n775\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n776\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n777\t\n778\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n779\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n780\t        offset: req.offset,\n781\t        limit: req.limit,\n782\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n783\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n784\t        failed_shards,\n785\t    };\n786\t\n787\t    // Span for the merge operation\n788\t    let _span = info_span!(\n789\t        \"merge\",\n790\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n791\t        offset = req.offset,\n792\t        limit = req.limit,\n793\t    ).entered();\n794\t\n795\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n796\t}\n797\t\n798\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n799\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n800\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n801\t\n802\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n803\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n804\t    match query {\n805\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n806\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n807\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n808\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n809\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n810\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n811\t            }\n812\t            terms\n813\t        }\n814\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n815\t    }\n816\t}\n817\t\n818\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n819\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n820\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n821\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n822\t    client: &C,\n823\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n824\t    topology: &Topology,\n825\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n826\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n827\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n828\t    }\n829\t\n830\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n831\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n832\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n833\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n834\t        }\n835\t    }\n836\t\n837\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n838\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n839\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n840\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n841\t            None => continue,\n842\t        };\n843\t        let client_ref = client;\n844\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n845\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n846\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n847\t    }\n848\t\n849\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n850\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n851\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n852\t}\n853\t\n854\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n855\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n856\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n857\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n858\t    client: &C,\n859\t    req: SearchRequest,\n860\t    topology: &Topology,\n861\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n862\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n863\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n864\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n865\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n866\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n867\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n868\t    };\n869\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n870\t    let mut search_req = req;\n871\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n872\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n873\t}\n874\t\n875\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n876\t// Mock client\n877\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n878\t\n879\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n880\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n881\t    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n882\t    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n883\t    pub write_responses: HashMap<NodeId, WriteResponse>,\n884\t    pub fetch_responses: HashMap<NodeId, FetchDocumentsResponse>,\n885\t    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n886\t    pub delay_ms: u64,\n887\t}\n888\t\n889\timpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n890\t    async fn search_node(\n891\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n892\t    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n893\t        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n894\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n895\t        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n896\t            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n897\t        }))\n898\t    }\n899\t\n900\t    async fn preflight_node(\n901\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n902\t    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n903\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n904\t        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n905\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n906\t        }))\n907\t    }\n908\t\n909\t    async fn write_documents(\n910\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n911\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n912\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n913\t        Ok(self.write_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n914\t            WriteResponse {\n915\t std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n953\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n954\t        // Return stored fetch response if available, Handle pagination: if offset exceeds total, return empty results\n965\t        if request.offset as u64 >= stored.total {\n966\t            return Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n967\t                results: Vec::new(),\n968\t                limit: request.limit,\n969\t                offset: request.offset,\n970\t                total: stored.total,\n971\t            });\n972\t        }\n973\t\n974\t        Ok(stored)\n975\t    }\n976\t\n977\t    fn get_task_status(\n978\t        &self,\n979\t        node: &NodeId,\n980\t        _address: &str,\n981\t        _request: error_type: None,\n995\t            })\n996\t        }\n997\t    }\n998\t}\n999\t\n1000\t#[cfg(test)]\n1001\tmod tests {\n1002\t    use super::*;\n1003\t    use crate::topology::{Node, {\n1177\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1178\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1179\t        });\n1180\t        let s = assert!(!r.degraded);\n1183\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1184\t    }\n1185\t\n1186\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1187\t    ///\n1188\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1189\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1190\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1191\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1192\t    ///\n1193\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1194\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1195\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1196\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1197\t    ///\n1198\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1199\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1200\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1201\t    ///\n1202\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1203\t    #[tokio::test]\n1204\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1205\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1206\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1207\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1208\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1209\t\n1210\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3, None).await;\n1211\t\n1212\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1213\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1214\t\n1215\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1216\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1217\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1218\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1219\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1220\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1221\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1222\t            ]),\n1223\t        });\n1224\t\n1225\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1226\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1227\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1228\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1229\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1230\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1231\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1232\t            ]),\n1233\t        });\n1234\t\n1235\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1236\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1237\t            total_docs: 10,\n1238\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1239\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1240\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1241\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1242\t            ]),\n1243\t        });\n1244\t\n1245\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1246\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1247\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1248\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1249\t            filter: None,\n1250\t        };\n1251\t\n1252\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1253\t\n1254\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1255\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1256\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1257\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1258\t\n1259\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1260\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1261\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1262\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1263\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1264\t\n1265\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1266\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1267\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1268\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1269\t\n1270\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1271\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1272\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1273\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1274\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1275\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1276\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1277\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1278\t    }\n1279\t\n1280\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1281\t    #[tokio::test]\n1282\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1283\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1284\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n1285\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1296\t    }\n1297\t\n1298\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1299\t    #[tokio::test]\n1300\t    async fn Scatter orchestration: fan-out logic and covering set builder.\n\nuse crate::config::UnavailableShardPolicy;\nuse crate::replica_selection::ReplicaSelector;\nuse tracing::{instrument, info_span, Instrument};\nuse crate::merger::{MergeInput, MergedSearchResult, MergeStrategy, ShardHitPage};\nuse crate::router::{covering_set, covering_set_with_version_floor, query_group};\nuse crate::topology::{NodeId, Topology};\nuse crate::Result;\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\n/// Scatter plan: the exact shard→node mapping for a search query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ScatterPlan {\n    pub chosen_group: u32,\n    pub target_shards: Vec<u32>,\n    pub shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId>,\n    pub deadline_ms: u32,\n    pub hedging_eligible: bool,\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// §15 OP#4: Global-IDF preflight (dfs_query_then_fetch pattern)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Per-term document frequency from a single shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n}\n\n/// Preflight request: gather term-frequency statistics from a shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub terms: Vec<String>,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a shard's preflight query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightResponse {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub term_stats: HashMap<String, TermStats>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global term statistics after coordinator aggregation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalTermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n    pub idf: f64,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global IDF data computed at the coordinator.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalIdf {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub terms: HashMap<String, GlobalTermStats>,\n}\n\nimpl GlobalIdf {\n    /// Aggregate per-shard preflight responses into global IDF.\n    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n        for resp in responses {\n            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n            }\n        }\n\n        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n            total_length / total_docs as f64\n        } else {\n            0.0\n        };\n\n        let n = total_docs as f64;\n        let terms = term_df\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(|(term, df)| {\n                let idf = if df == 0 {\n                    0.0\n                } else {\n                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n                };\n                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Write path: document operations (P2.2)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Request to add/replace documents on a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub documents: Vec<Value>,\n    pub primary_key: Option<String>,\n    /// Internal origin tag for CDC event suppression (plan §13.13).\n    /// - None = client write (always emitted to CDC)\n    /// - Some(\"antientropy\") = anti-entropy repair write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"reshard_backfill\") = reshard backfill write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"rollover\") = ILM rollover write (suppressed unless emit_internal_writes)\n    /// - Some(\"ttl_expire\") = TTL expiration delete (suppressed unless emit_ttl_deletes)\n    ///\n    /// This field is NEVER stored on documents and never returned to clients.\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub origin: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a single node's document write operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteResponse {\n    pub success: bool,\n    pub task_uid: Option<u64>,\n    pub message: Option<String>,\n    pub code: Option<String>,\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Request to delete documents by IDs.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct DeleteByIdsRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub ids: Vec<String>,\n    /// Internal origin tag for CDC event suppression (plan §13.13).\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub origin: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Request to delete all documents matching a filter.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct DeleteByFilterRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub filter: Value,\n    /// Internal origin tag for CDC event suppression (plan §13.13).\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    pub origin: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a delete operation.\npub type DeleteResponse = WriteResponse;\n\n/// Request to fetch documents with a filter (used for shard migration).\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct FetchDocumentsRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub filter: Value,\n    pub limit: u32,\n    pub offset: u32,\n}\n\n/// Response from a fetch documents operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct FetchDocumentsResponse {\n    pub results: Vec<Value>,\n    pub limit: u32,\n    pub offset: u32,\n    pub total: u64,\n}\n\n/// Request to get task status from a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TaskStatusRequest {\n    /// The task UID to query\n    pub task_uid: u64,\n}\n\n/// Response from a single node's task status query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// The task UID\n    pub task_uid: u64,\n    /// Current task status\n    pub status: String,\n    /// Error message if failed\n    pub error: Option<String>,\n    /// Error type if failed\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\nimpl TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// Convert Meilisearch status string to NodeTaskStatus.\n    pub fn to_node_status(&self) -> crate::task::NodeTaskStatus {\n        match self.status.as_str() {\n            \"enqueued\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            \"processing\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Processing,\n            \"succeeded\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Succeeded,\n            \"failed\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Failed,\n            _ => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// HTTP client for communicating with a Meilisearch node.\n#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\npub trait NodeClient: Send + Sync {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        address: &str,\n        request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError>;\n\n    /// Execute a preflight request (OP#4 global-IDF phase).\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(PreflightResponse { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() })\n    }\n\n    /// Write documents to a node (add/replace).\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(WriteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Get task status from a node.\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        async move {\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid: _request.task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Delete documents by IDs from a node.\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Delete all documents matching a filter from a node.\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Fetch documents with a filter from a node (used for shard migration).\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n            results: Vec::new(),\n            limit: _request.limit,\n            offset: _request.offset,\n            total: 0,\n        })\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub enum NodeError {\n    Timeout,\n    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n    NetworkError(String),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct SearchRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub query: Option<String>,\n    pub offset: usize,\n    pub limit: usize,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    pub ranking_score: bool,\n    pub body: Value,\n    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n}\n\nimpl SearchRequest {\n    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n    ///\n    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n    /// data to apply pagination.\n    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n\n        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n\n        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n\n        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n\n        // Ensure query is set\n        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n        }\n\n        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n        }\n\n        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n        }\n\n        body\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct ScatterResult {\n    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n    pub partial: bool,\n    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub async fn plan_search_scatter(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = crate::router::query_group_active(query_seq, topology);\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n\n        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n            match selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n                Some(node) => node,\n                None => replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone(),\n            }\n        } else {\n            replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n///\n/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    floor: u64,\n    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let chosen_group = crate::router::query_group_active(query_seq, topology);\n\n    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n\n    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        rf,\n        query_seq,\n        index,\n        floor,\n        version_checker,\n    )?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        // Filter by version floor\n        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n            .iter()\n            .filter(|node_id| {\n                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n                version >= floor\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        if eligible.is_empty() {\n            return None;\n        }\n\n        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n            // Convert Vec<&NodeId> to Vec<NodeId> for selector\n            let eligible_owned: Vec<NodeId> = eligible.iter().map(|&n| n.clone()).collect();\n            match selector.select(&eligible_owned, chosen_group).await {\n                Some(node) => node,\n                None => eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone(),\n            }\n        } else {\n            eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()].clone()\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n///\n/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    pinned_group: u32,\n    replica_selector: Option<&ReplicaSelector>,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        let selected = if let Some(selector) = replica_selector {\n            match selector.select(&replicas, pinned_group).await {\n                Some(node) => node,\n                None => replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone(),\n            }\n        } else {\n            replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone()\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter using adaptive replica selection (plan §13.3).\n///\n/// Uses EWMA-based scoring to select the best replica for each shard,\n/// falling back to round-robin for shards with no metrics data.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub async fn plan_search_scatter_adaptive(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    replica_selector: &ReplicaSelector,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = crate::router::query_group_active(query_seq, topology);\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group,\n                target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n                deadline_ms: 0,\n                hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    // If the group has no nodes, return a plan with no targets\n    if group.nodes().is_empty() {\n        return ScatterPlan {\n            chosen_group,\n            target_shards: Vec::new(),\n            shard_to_node: HashMap::new(),\n            deadline_ms: 5000,\n            hedging_eligible: false,\n        };\n    }\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n\n        // Use adaptive selection to pick the best replica\n        let selected = match replica_selector.select(&replicas, chosen_group).await {\n            Some(node) => node,\n            None => {\n                // Fallback to round-robin if selector returns None\n                replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone()\n            }\n        };\n\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\npub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n\n    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => {\n                for shard_id in shards {\n                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n                }\n                continue;\n            }\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n        let shard_count = shards.len();\n        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n        let span = info_span!(\n            \"scatter_node\",\n            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n            address = %node.address,\n            shard_count = shard_count,\n        );\n        tasks.push(async move {\n            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n        }.instrument(span));\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n\n    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n        match result {\n            Ok(body) => {\n                for _shard_id in shards {\n                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n                }\n            }\n            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n                deadline_exceeded = true;\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n\n    match policy {\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n            }\n        }\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n\n                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n\n                    // Try each other replica group\n                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n                        }\n\n                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n                                continue;\n                            }\n\n                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n                            for node_id in replicas {\n                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                                        Ok(body) => {\n                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n                                            break;\n                                        }\n                                        Err(_) => {\n                                            continue; // Try next replica\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n\n                            if fallback_succeeded {\n                                break; // Found a working replica\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Merge fallback results\n                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n\n                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n                        shard_pages,\n                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n                        partial: false,\n                        deadline_exceeded,\n                    });\n                } else {\n                    // Some shards still failed\n                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n\n    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n    if scatter_result.partial {\n        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n\n    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n        offset: req.offset,\n        limit: req.limit,\n        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n        failed_shards,\n    };\n\n    // Span for the merge operation\n    let _span = info_span!(\n        \"merge\",\n        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n        offset = req.offset,\n        limit = req.limit,\n    ).entered();\n\n    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\npub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n    match query {\n        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n            }\n            terms\n        }\n        _ => Vec::new(),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\npub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: &PreflightRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n    }\n\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => continue,\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let nid = node_id.clone();\n        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n}\n\n/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n    };\n    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n    let mut search_req = req;\n    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Mock client\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\npub struct MockNodeClient {\n    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n    pub write_responses: HashMap<NodeId, WriteResponse>,\n    pub fetch_responses: HashMap<NodeId, FetchDocumentsResponse>,\n    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n    pub delay_ms: u64,\n}\n\nimpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.write_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            WriteResponse {\n                success: true,\n                task_uid: Some(1),\n                message: None,\n                code: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        // Return stored fetch response if available, otherwise return empty\n        let stored = self.fetch_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            FetchDocumentsResponse {\n                results: Vec::new(),\n                limit: request.limit,\n                offset: request.offset,\n                total: 0,\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Handle pagination: if offset exceeds total, return empty results\n        if request.offset as u64 >= stored.total {\n            return Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n                results: Vec::new(),\n                limit: request.limit,\n                offset: request.offset,\n                total: stored.total,\n            });\n        }\n\n        Ok(stored)\n    }\n\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        let node = node.clone();\n        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n        async move {\n            if let Some(err) = error {\n                return Err(err);\n            }\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n\n    fn make_test_topology() -> Topology {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 2, 2);\n        for i in 0u32..6 {\n            let rg = if i < 3 { 0 } else { 1 };\n            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), rg);\n            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n            topo.add_node(node);\n        }\n        topo\n    }\n\n    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n        SearchRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(), query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n            offset: 0, limit: 10, filter: None, facets: None,\n            ranking_score: false, body: serde_json::json!({}), global_idf: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_plan_pure_function() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n        assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 0);\n        assert_eq!(plan.target_shards.len(), 64);\n        assert!(plan.hedging_eligible);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_plan_group_rotation() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        assert_eq!(plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await.chosen_group, 0);\n        assert_eq!(plan_search_scatter(&topo, 1, 2, 64, None).await.chosen_group, 1);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_plan_shard_mapping() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64, None).await;\n        for s in 0..64 { assert!(plan.shard_to_node.contains_key(&s)); }\n        let g0 = topo.group(0).unwrap();\n        for (_, assert!(plan_search_scatter(&make_test_topology(), 0, 2, 64, None).await.hedging_eligible);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_scatter_mock() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\"}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n        let s =
