       StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR.into_response()\n950\t        }\n951\t    }\n952\t}\n953\t\n954\t/// POST /_miroir/ui/search/{index}/rotate-scoped-key — manual rotation trigger.\n955\t///\n956\t/// Admin-gated endpoint that initiates a scoped key rotation for the given index.\n957\t/// Set `force: true` in the request body to bypass the timing gate.\n958\tpub async fn rotate_scoped_key_handler<S>(\n959\t    State(state): State<S>,\n960\t    Path(index): Path<String>,\n961\t    Json(body): Json<RotateScopedKeyRequest>,\n962\t) -> Result<Json<RotateScopedKeyResponse>, (StatusCode, String)>\n963\twhere\n964\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n965\t    AppState: FromRef<S>,\n966\t{\n967\t    let app_state = AppState::from_ref(&state);\n968\t\n969\t    let redis = app_state.redis_store.clone().ok_or_else(|| {\n970\t        (\n971\t            StatusCode::PRECONDITION_FAILED,\n972\t            \"scoped key rotation requires Redis task store\".into(),\n973\t        )\n974\t    })?;\n975\t\n976\t    if !app_state.config.search_ui.enabled {\n977\t        return Err((\n978\t            StatusCode::PRECONDITION_FAILED,\n979\t            \"search_ui is not enabled\".into(),\n980\t        ));\n981\t    }\n982\t\n983\t    let rotation_state = ScopedKeyRotationState {\n984\t        config: app_state.config.clone(),\n985\t        redis,\n986\t        pod_id: app_state.pod_id.clone(),\n987\t    };\n988\t\n989\t    info!(\n990\t        index = %index,\n991\t        force = body.force,\n992\t        pod_id = %app_state.pod_id,\n993\t        \"manual scoped key rotation triggered\"\n994\t    );\n995\t\n996\t    match scoped_key_rotation::check_and_rotate(&rotation_state, &index, body.force).await {\n997\t        Ok(response) => Ok(Json(response)),\n998\t        Err(e) => {\n999\t            error!(index = %index, error = %e, \"manual scoped key rotation failed\");\n1000\t            Err((StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, e))\n1001\t        }\n1002\t    }\n1003\t}\n1004\t\n1005\t/// Parse a rate limit string like \"10/minute\" into (limit, window_seconds).\n1006\tpub fn parse_rate_limit(s: &str) -> Result<(u64, u64), String> {\n1007\t    let parts: Vec<&str> = s.split('/').collect();\n1008\t    if parts.len() != 2 {\n1009\t        return Err(format!(\"invalid rate limit format: '{}', expected 'N/UNIT'\", s));\n1010\t    }\n1011\t    let limit: u64 = parts[0].parse()\n1012\t        .map_err(|_| format!(\"invalid limit number: '{}'\", parts[0]))?;\n1013\t    let window_seconds = match parts[1] {\n1014\t        \"second\" | \"s\" => 1,\n1015\t        \"minute\" | \"m\" => 60,\n1016\t        \"hour\" | \"h\" => 3600,\n1017\t        \"day\" | \"d\" => 86400,\n1018\t        unit => return Err(format!(\"invalid time unit: '{}', expected second/minute/hour/day\", unit)),\n1019\t    };\n1020\t    Ok((limit, window_seconds))\n1021\t}\n1022\t\n1023\t/// Generate a random session ID.\n1024\tfn generate_session_id() -> String {\n1025\t    let mut bytes = [0u8; 24];\n1026\t    rand::rngs::OsRng.fill_bytes(&mut bytes);\n1027\t    hex::encode(&bytes)\n1028\t}\n1029\t\n1030\t/// POST /_miroir/admin/login — admin login with rate limiting and exponential backoff.\n1031\t///\n1032\t/// Request body:\n1033\t/// ```json\n1034\t/// { \"admin_key\": \"...\" }\n1035\t/// ```\n1036\t///\n1037\t/// On success, sets a `miroir_admin_session` cookie and returns:\n1038\t/// ```json\n1039\t/// { \"success\": true }\n1040\t/// ```\n1041\t///\n1042\t/// Rate limiting (per source IP):\n1043\t/// - 10 requests per minute (configurable via `admin_ui.rate_limit.per_ip`)\n1044\t/// - After 5 consecutive failed attempts, exponential backoff applies:\n1045\t///   - 10m, 20m, 40m, ... up to 24h cap\n1046\t///\n1047\t/// Successful login resets both the rate limit counter and backoff state.\n1048\tpub async fn admin_login<S>(\n1049\t    State(state): State<S>,\n1050\t    headers: HeaderMap,\n1051\t    Json(body): Json<AdminLoginRequest>,\n1052\t) -> Response\n1053\twhere\n1054\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n1055\t    AppState: FromRef<S>,\n1056\t{\n1057\t    let state = AppState::from_ref(&state);\n1058\t\n1059\t    // Extract source IP from X-Forwarded-For or X-Real-IP (trust proxy)\n1060\t    let source_ip = headers\n1061\t        .get(\"x-forwarded-for\")\n1062\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n1063\t        .and_then(|s| s.split(',').next())\n1064\t        .or_else(|| headers.get(\"x-real-ip\").and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok()))\n1065\t        .unwrap_or(\"unknown\")\n1066\t        .trim()\n1067\t        .to_string();\n1068\t\n1069\t    // Parse rate limit config\n1070\t    let (limit, window_seconds) = match parse_rate_limit(&state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.per_ip) {\n1071\t        Ok(parsed) => parsed,\n1072\t        Err(e) => {\n1073\t            error!(error = %e, \"invalid admin_ui.rate_limit.per_ip config\");\n1074\t            return (\n1075\t                StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n1076\t                Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1077\t                    success: false,\n1078\t                    message: Some(\"Rate limit configuration error\".into()),\n1079\t                }),\n1080\t            ).into_response();\n1081\t        }\n1082\t    };\n1083\t\n1084\t    // Check rate limit and backoff\n1085\t    let backend = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backend.as_str();\n1086\t    if backend == \"redis\" {\n1087\t        if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n1088\t            match redis.check_rate_limit_admin_login(&source_ip, limit, window_seconds) {\n1089\t                Ok((allowed, wait_seconds)) => {\n1090\t                    if !allowed {\n1091\t                        if let Some(ws) = wait_seconds {\n1092\t                            warn!(\n1093\t                                source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n1094\t                                wait_seconds = ws,\n1095\t                                \"admin login rate limited (backoff)\"\n1096\t                            );\n1097\t                            return (\n1098\t                                StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,\n1099\t                                Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1100\t                                    success: false,\n1101\t                                    message: Some(format!(\n1102\t                                        \"Too many failed login attempts. Try again in {} seconds.\",\n1103\t                                        ws\n1104\t                                    )),\n1105\t                                }),\n1106\t                            ).into_response();\n1107\t                        } else {\n1108\t                            return (\n1109\t                                StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,\n1110\t                                Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1111\t                                    success: false,\n1112\t                                    message: Some(\"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\".into()),\n1113\t                                }),\n1114\t                            ).into_response();\n1115\t                        }\n1116\t                    }\n1117\t                    // Allowed, proceed\n1118\t                }\n1119\t                Err(e) => {\n1120\t                    error!(error = %e, \"failed to check admin login rate limit\");\n1121\t                    // Continue anyway on error (fail-open)\n1122\t                }\n1123\t            }\n1124\t        }\n1125\t    } else if backend == \"local\" {\n1126\t        // Local backend rate limiting\n1127\t        let (allowed, wait_seconds) = state.local_rate_limiter.check(\n1128\t            &source_ip,\n1129\t            limit,\n1130\t            window_seconds * 1000,\n1131\t            state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.failed_attempt_threshold,\n1132\t            state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backoff_start_minutes,\n1133\t            state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backoff_max_hours * 60,\n1134\t        );\n1135\t        if !allowed {\n1136\t            warn!(\n1137\t                source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n1138\t                wait_seconds = ?wait_seconds,\n1139\t                \"admin login rate limited (local backend)\"\n1140\t            );\n1141\t            return (\n1142\t                StatusCode::TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,\n1143\t                Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1144\t                    success: false,\n1145\t                    message: if let Some(ws) = wait_seconds {\n1146\t                        Some(format!(\n1147\t                            \"Too many failed login attempts. Try again in {} seconds.\",\n1148\t                            ws\n1149\t                        ))\n1150\t                    } else {\n1151\t                        Some(\"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\".into())\n1152\t                    },\n1153\t                }),\n1154\t            ).into_response();\n1155\t        }\n1156\t    }\n1157\t\n1158\t    // Verify admin_key (constant-time comparison to prevent timing side-channels)\n1159\t    use subtle::ConstantTimeEq as _;\n1160\t    if body.admin_key.as_bytes().ct_eq(state.config.admin.api_key.as_bytes()).into() {\n1161\t        // Successful login - reset rate limit counters\n1162\t        if backend == \"redis\" {\n1163\t            if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n1164\t                if let Err(e) = redis.reset_rate_limit_admin_login(&source_ip) {\n1165\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to reset admin login rate limit\");\n1166\t                }\n1167\t            }\n1168\t        } else if backend == \"local\" {\n1169\t            state.local_rate_limiter.reset(&source_ip);\n1170\t        }\n1171\t\n1172\t        // Generate session ID and seal it\n1173\t        let session_id = generate_session_id();\n1174\t        let sealed = match seal_session(&session_id, &state.seal_key) {\n1175\t            Ok(sealed) => sealed,\n1176\t            Err(e) => {\n1177\t                error!(error = %e, \"failed to seal admin session\");\n1178\t                return (\n1179\t                    StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n1180\t                    Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1181\t                        success: false,\n1182\t                        message: Some(\"Failed to create session\".into()),\n1183\t                    }),\n1184\t                ).into_response();\n1185\t            }\n1186\t        };\n1187\t\n1188\t        info!(\n1189\t            source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n1190\t            session_prefix = &session_id[..8],\n1191\t            \"admin login successful\"\n1192\t        );\n1193\t\n1194\t        // Set cookie and return success\n1195\t        (\n1196\t            StatusCode::OK,\n1197\t            [\n1198\t                (\"Set-Cookie\", format!(\"{}={}; HttpOnly; Secure; SameSite=Strict; Path=/; Max-Age={}\",\n1199\t                    COOKIE_NAME, sealed, state.config.admin_ui.session_ttl_s)),\n1200\t            ],\n1201\t            Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1202\t                success: true,\n1203\t                message: None,\n1204\t            }),\n1205\t        ).into_response()\n1206\t    } else {\n1207\t        // Wrong admin_key - record failure for backoff tracking\n1208\t        warn!(\n1209\t            source_ip_hash = hash_for_log(&source_ip),\n1210\t            \"admin login failed: invalid admin_key\"\n1211\t        );\n1212\t\n1213\t        if backend == \"redis\" {\n1214\t            if let Some(ref redis) = state.redis_store {\n1215\t                let backoff_start_minutes = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backoff_start_minutes;\n1216\t                let backoff_max_hours = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backoff_max_hours;\n1217\t                let failed_threshold = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.failed_attempt_threshold;\n1218\t\n1219\t                if let Err(e) = redis.record_failure_admin_login(\n1220\t                    &source_ip,\n1221\t                    failed_threshold,\n1222\t                    backoff_start_minutes,\n1223\t                    backoff_max_hours,\n1224\t                ) {\n1225\t                    warn!(error = %e, \"failed to record admin login failure\");\n1226\t                }\n1227\t            }\n1228\t        } else if backend == \"local\" {\n1229\t            let backoff_start_minutes = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backoff_start_minutes;\n1230\t            let backoff_max_hours = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.backoff_max_hours;\n1231\t            let failed_threshold = state.config.admin_ui.rate_limit.failed_attempt_threshold;\n1232\t\n1233\t            state.local_rate_limiter.record_failure(\n1234\t                &source_ip,\n1235\t                failed_threshold,\n1236\t                backoff_start_minutes,\n1237\t                backoff_max_hours * 60,\n1238\t            );\n1239\t        }\n1240\t\n1241\t        (\n1242\t            StatusCode::UNAUTHORIZED,\n1243\t            Json(AdminLoginResponse {\n1244\t                success: false,\n1245\t                message: Some(\"Invalid admin key\".into()),\n1246\t            }),\n1247\t        ).into_response()\n1248\t    }\n1249\t}\n1250\t\n1251\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1252\t// Rebalancer Admin API Endpoints (plan §4)\n1253\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n1254\t\n1255\t/// POST /_miroir/nodes — Add a node to a replica group.\n1256\t///\n1257\t/// Request body:\n1258\t/// ```json\n1259\t/// {\n1260\t///   \"id\": \"node-new\",\n1261\t///   \"address\": \"http://node-new:7700\",\n1262\t///   \"replica_group\": 0\n1263\t/// }\n1264\t/// ```\n1265\t///\n1266\t/// Implements plan §2 \"Adding a node to an existing group\":\n1267\t/// 1. Add node to topology in `Joining` state\n1268\t/// 2. Send `NodeAdded` event to rebalancer worker\n1269\t/// 3. Worker computes affected shards and starts migration with leader lease\n1270\tpub async fn add_node<S>(\n1271\t    State(state): State<S>,\n1272\t    Json(body): Json<serde_json::Value>,\n1273\t) -> Result<Json<serde_json::Value>, (StatusCode, String)>\n1274\twhere\n1275\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n1276\t    AppState: FromRef<S>,\n1277\t{\n1278\t    let app_state = AppState::from_ref(&state);\n1279\t\n1280\t    let id = body.get(\"id\")\n1281\t        .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n1282\t        .ok_or_else(|| (StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST, \"Missing 'id' field\".into()))?\n1283\t        .to_string();\n1284\t\n1285\t    let address = body.get(\"address\")\n1286\t        .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n1287\t        .ok_or_else(|| (StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST, \"Missing 'address' field\".into()))?\n1288\t        .to_string();\n1289\t\n1290\t    let replica_group = body.get(\"replica_group\")\n1291\t        .and_then(|v| v.as_u64())\n1292\t        .ok_or_else(|| (StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST, \"Missing 'replica_group' field\".into()))?\n1293\t        as u32;\n1294\t\n1295\t    // Add node to topology\n1296\t    {\n1297\t        let mut topo = app_state.topology.write().await;\n1298\t        // Check if node already exists\n1299\t        let node_id = NodeId::new(id.clone());\n1300\t        if topo.node(&node_id).is_some() {\n1301\t            return Err((StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,\n1302\t                format!(\"Node {} already exists\", id)));\n1303\t        }\n1304\t        // Check if replica group exists\n1305\t        let group_count = topo.groups().count() as u32;\n1306\t        if replica_group >= group_count {\n1307\t            return Err((StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST,\n1308\t                format!(\"Replica group {} does not exist\", replica_group)));\n1309\t        }\n1310\t        let node = Node::new(node_id, address, replica_group);\n1311\t        topo.add_node(node);\n1312\t    }\n1313\t\n1314\t    // Send id.clone(),\n1318\t            replica_group,\n1319\t            index_uid: \"default\".to_string(),\n1320\t        };\n1321\t        if let Err(e) = worker.event_sender().try_send(event) {\n1322\t            error!(error = %e, node_id = %id, \"failed to send NodeAdded event to rebalancer worker\");\n1323\t            return Err((StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,\n1324\t                format!(\"Failed to queue rebalancing: {}\", e)));\n1325\t        }\n1326\t    }\n1327\t\n1328\t    info!(node_id = %id, replica_group, \"Node addition queued for rebalancing\");\n1329\t    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({\n1330\t        \"node_id\": id,\n1331\t        \"replica_group\": replica_group,\n1332\t        \"message\": format!(\"Node {} added to replica group {}, rebalancing will start shortly\", id, replica_group),\n1333\t    })))\n1334\t}\n1335\t\n1336\t/// DELETE /_miroir/nodes/{id} — Remove a node from the cluster.\n1337\t///\n1338\t/// Request body (optional):\n1339\t/// ```json\n1340\t/// {\n1341\t///   \"force\": false  // Set to true to bypass draining check\n1342\t/// }\n1343\t/// ```\n1344\t///\n1345\t/// Requires the node to be in `draining` state unless `force=true`.\n1346\t/// Note: This only removes the node from topology. Draining must be completed first.\n1347\tpub async fn remove_node<S>(\n1348\t    State(state): State<S>,\n1349\t    Path(node_id): Path<String>,\n1350\t    Json(body): Json<serde_json::Value>,\n1351\t) -> Result<Json<serde_json::Value>, (StatusCode, String)>\n1352\twhere\n1353\t    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n1354\t    AppState: FromRef<S>,\n1355\t{\n1356\t group\n1371\t        let group = topo.groups()\n1372\t            .find(|g| g.id == node.replica_group)\n1373\t            .ok_or_else(|| (StatusCode::INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, format!(\"Replica group {} not found\", node.replica_group)))?;\n1374\t\n1375\t        if group.nodes().len() <= 1 {\n1376\t            return Err((StatusCode::BAD_REQUEST, \"Cannot remove the last node in a replica group\".into()));\n1377\t        }\n1378\t\n1379\t        node.status\n1380\t    };\n1381\t\n1382\t    if !force && node_status != miroir_core::topology::NodeStatus::Draining {\n1383\t        return ).into()));\n1387\t    }\n1388\t\n1389\t    // Remove node from topology\n1390\t    {\n1391\t        let mut topo = app_state.topology.write().await;\n1392\t };\n1610\t\n1611\t    Ok(Json(serde_json::json!({\n1612\t        \"rebalancer\": rebalancer_status,\n1613\t        \"worker\": worker_status,\n1614\t    })))\n1615\t}\n1616\t\n1617\t/// POST /_miroir/replica_groups — Add a replica group.\n1618\t///\n1619\t/// Request body:\n1620\t/// ```json\n1621\t/// {\n1622\t///   \"group_id\": 2,\n1623\t///   \"nodes\": [\n1624\t///     {\"id\": RebalancerMetrics},\n    rebalancer_worker::{RebalancerMetricsCallback, RebalancerWorker, RebalancerWorkerConfig, TopologyChangeEvent},\n    replica_selection::{ReplicaSelector, SelectionObserver},\n
